sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14163" key="a)pou/lwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπούλ-ωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n14163.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">free from scar,</tr_> prob. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1091e</biblScope> </bibl> (for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀπουλώτιστος</foreign> : <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀμωλώπιστος</foreign> Bern.).</sense> </entryFree>
